raw_response: {"response":"Reject. The proposed workflow does not support the finance analyst's actual decision: checking the effect of a formula change before it touches the workbook. It narrows the work to editing and saving, with no calculated-result preview, no before/after changed-cell comparison, no formula error state, and no way to validate or back out before applying.","next_action":"Repair the workflow so the analyst edits the formula, previews calculated results, reviews changed cells with selected formula context preserved, resolves errors or warnings, and only then applies the change with visible confirmation and a return path.","questions":[],"handoff":"Decision: reject; owner: workflow revision agent; action: repair and resubmit; reason: apply/save is not gated by calculated preview, changed-cell comparison, or formula-error validation; verification: confirm evidence stays beside apply controls before workbook commit.","rationale":"Progressive evaluation is the core activity here, not optional support. A trusted workflow must keep decision-changing evidence adjacent to the commit action and make the pre-apply validation state explicit."}

parsed.response: Reject. The proposed workflow does not support the finance analyst's actual decision: checking the effect of a formula change before it touches the workbook. It narrows the work to editing and saving, with no calculated-result preview, no before/after changed-cell comparison, no formula error state, and no way to validate or back out before applying.
parsed.next_action: Repair the workflow so the analyst edits the formula, previews calculated results, reviews changed cells with selected formula context preserved, resolves errors or warnings, and only then applies the change with visible confirmation and a return path.
parsed.handoff: Decision: reject; owner: workflow revision agent; action: repair and resubmit; reason: apply/save is not gated by calculated preview, changed-cell comparison, or formula-error validation; verification: confirm evidence stays beside apply controls before workbook commit.
parsed.rationale: Progressive evaluation is the core activity here, not optional support. A trusted workflow must keep decision-changing evidence adjacent to the commit action and make the pre-apply validation state explicit.

execution.command_display: codex exec --model gpt-5.5 -c model_reasoning_effort="xhigh" --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check --ephemeral --color never --output-schema <schema> --output-last-message <output> -
